title: potentilla umbrosa subsp. umbrosa
intro: Potentilla umbrosa subsp. umbrosa, also known as the shadow cinquefoil or woodland cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Potentilla umbrosa subsp. umbrosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
